posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all @here,
we are happy to announce that during the hackathon with monday.com we created a burndown chart App to be used in boards!

A quick preview:

image (8)1349×822 60.7 KB

If you are interested, let me know! As we will have the ability to share the app with other accounts soon!

Looking forward to hearing from you @ dmitry@tmnxt.com (we are a certified monday.com partner for the DACH Region)

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Please we want thisss

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I will check with the monday.com dev team to get the app rolled out to everyone who wants to give it a try and also provide some feedback for further improvements!
You can shoot me a message so we can try to get the app activated in the backend. (monday involvement needed here)

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Great work! The image does look promising @Dmitry, I am really interested to test it. Can you let me know when monday did their part?

posts.author: Kateryna (Kateryna)
posts.cookedHtml: HI @Dmitry, can you allow us to test that, as well, please? we have started with few projects, already and want to use this feature to support implementation. Thank you!!

posts.author: LaunchcodeBrandon (Brandon)
posts.cookedHtml: How do we get access to this?

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all @here, I will share the link with you guys to activate the app within your accounts. Will paste the link in here together with the documentation latest tomorrow

Cheers

Dmitry

Thanks!

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all, we have a new version of the burndown chart that will make configuration way easier. The new version will be deployed today.

For those of you, who actively use the app already, you will need to change the link to item column name to “Linked Sprint”.
Besides that, you can also deactivate the automation for the updates as the app now is taking the information from the activity log.

You will find our documentation here: burndown chart documentation download

Feedback is very appreciated.

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the update. I wil check out the new burndown chart asap.

After reading the documentation i was wondering if you have it on your roadmap to be able to select groups to show in the burndown chart. Like the battery does in the monday dashboard. Thanks !

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Eltjo,

yes, it is on the roadmap. Thank you very much for providing feedback and using our app

posts.author: jogo (Jordan G)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t get the completed status items to show up in the chart.

image1842×1009 96.2 KB

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jogo, this is something we are currently working on.

Besides that, we are finalizing our UI improvements and the setup process to make it easier for users and soon will get listed on the monday marketplace. Once we are approved by the monday team, I will post in this thread

Thanks for giving our app a try and soon you can use it properly.

posts.author: jogo (Jordan G)
posts.cookedHtml: Got it! Thanks for building this! It was definitely atop our teams’ needs/wish list. It will help us use Monday more effectively for agile software development into the future, great value add. Cheers!

posts.author: Shierly (Shierly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you have an update on the question above? “I can’t get the completed status items to show up in the chart.” also, how can we show the Sprint Burndown Chart like in JIRA?

image1587×727 90.6 KB
is this possible in Monday.Com?

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Shierly ,

the burndown chart is now listed in the marketplace with improved UI/UX. Please have a look and let me know your thoughts.

It would be great to know what you would like to see in the view to make it better (as referred to the jira chart view).

Cheers

Dmitry

posts.cookedHtml: It’s very nice have this apps, but I want to convert my subitems task to present with this chart. Is it possible for you to give that option?
